members.name: Ervin Frenzel
members.title: CEO
members.bio: I designed/led multiple cyber programs across Texas and worked in many different cybersecurity and technical capacities over the past 36 years, GRC, bench technician, SOC tech and mgr, Security Manager, CISO, CEO, instructor, and consultant. As a multidisciplinary cyber practitioner, I hold ISC2 and EC Council cyber credentials, CompTIA and Microsoft technical component certs, and a MISM, MSCSISM, and  PhD.  I am the EC Council Academic instructor of the years (2020 + 2024), a NICE Ambassador.

members.name: Richard Lightcap
members.title: Dean of Information Technology
members.bio: Dr. Richard Lightcap is a cybersecurity leader, researcher, and educator specializing in AI-driven security operations, network security engineering, and enterprise risk governance. His work focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence and cybersecurity, with an emphasis on workforce transformation, decision-making, and modern security architectures. He is the author of The AI-Driven CISO: Executive Strategies for Modern Cybersecurity Leadership, Leading in the Age of Intelligent Sysems, and contributes to advancing AI literacy and cybersecurity education.
members.degree: PhD in Cybersecurity Leadership, Capitol Technology University
